# Resolved Model Profiles
<!-- Generated by scripts/resolve-profiles.js on 2026-04-26T18:59:18.446Z -->
<!-- Do not edit manually — re-run the script to regenerate -->

[agent: architect | model: sonnet]
prompt_style: xml-tagged
role_assignment: xml-role-tag
chain_of_thought: extended-thinking
output_format: xml-wrapped
forbidden: plain-numbered-lists, bare-markdown-structure
plan_format: <plan><score value="{score}">{reasoning}</score><file_tree>{tree}</file_tree><tasks>{tasks}</tasks></plan>
score_format: <score_result><value>{N}</value><verdict>STOP_FOR_HUMAN|PROCEED_AUTONOMOUSLY</verdict><reasoning>{text}</reasoning></score_result>
chaos_format: <chaos_report><scenario id="{N}">{text}</scenario><verdict>PASS|FAIL</verdict><issues>{blocking}</issues></chaos_report>
review_format: <review><verdict>READY_FOR_MERGE|CHANGES_REQUESTED</verdict><architect>{result}</architect><coverage>{pct}%</coverage></review>
[/agent]

[agent: product | model: none]
prompt_style: plain-numbered
role_assignment: inline-you-are
chain_of_thought: none
output_format: markdown-sections
forbidden: none
plan_format: # Plan: {feature}\nScore: {N} | Status: {status}\n## File Changes\n{tree}\n## Tasks\n{tasks}
score_format: # Score: {feature}\nComplexity: {N}/5\nVerdict: STOP_FOR_HUMAN | PROCEED_AUTONOMOUSLY\nReasoning: {text}
chaos_format: # Chaos Audit: {branch}\nVerdict: PASS | FAIL\n## Scenarios\n{scenarios}\n## Blocking Issues\n{issues}
review_format: # PR Review: {feature}\nVerdict: READY_FOR_MERGE | CHANGES_REQUESTED\nArchitect: {result}\nCoverage: {pct}%
[/agent]
